subject: FW: The Great Debaters/January 8th
body:
From: Andres Fernandez [mailto:andres@peggysiegal.com] On Behalf Of
Peggy Siegal
Sent: Tuesday, January 08, 2008 11:42 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: The Great Debaters/January 8th 

 

 

RONALD PERELMAN

AND HARVEY WEINSTEIN

 

INVITE YOU AND A GUEST

TO A SPECIAL SCREENING OF

 

BEST PICTURE - GOLDEN GLOBE AWARD NOMINEE

WINNER - NATIONAL BOARD OF REVIEW - FREEDOM OF EXPRESSION

WINNER - STANLEY KRAMER AWARD - PRODUCERS GUILD OF AMERICA

THE GREAT

DEBATERS

INSPIRED BY A TRUE STORY

 

TUESDAY, JANUARY 8, 2008

 

6:00PM - 7:30PM COCKTAIL RECEPTION

AT THE HOME OF RONALD PERELMAN

36 EAST 63RD STREET

(BETWEEN MADISON AND PARK)

 

8:00PM SCREENING

CITY CINEMA 1.2.3.

1001 THIRD AVENUE

(BETWEEN 59TH AND 60TH)

 

PEGGY@PEGGYSIEGAL.COM OR 212-935-6700

THIS INVITATION IS NON-TRANSFERABLE

 

Presented by The Weinstein Company and Harpo Films, "The Great
Debaters," was released by MGM on December 25th.

 

Believe in the power of words.

>From two-time Academy Award winner Denzel Washington and an ensemble
cast lead by Washington that includes Academy Award winner Forest
Whitaker, comes THE GREAT DEBATERS.   Inspired by a true story, THE
GREAT DEBATERS chronicles the journey of Professor Melvin Tolson (Denzel
Washington), a brilliant but volatile debate team coach who uses the
power of words to shape a group of underdog students from a small
African American college in the deep south into a historically elite
debate team. A controversial figure, Professor Tolson challenged the
social mores of the time and was under constant fire for his
unconventional and ferocious teaching methods as well as his radical
political views.

In their pursuit for excellence, Tolson's debate team receives a
groundbreaking invitation to debate Harvard University's championship
team. The film is directed by Denzel Washington and stars Washington,
Forest Whitaker, Jurnee Smollett, Nate Parker, Denzel Whitaker, and
Kimberly Elise. "The Great Debaters" was written by Robert Eisele and
produced by Todd Black, Kate Forte, Oprah Winfrey and Joe Roth.

Presented by The Weinstein Company and Harpo Films, "The Great Debaters," was released by MGM on December 25th.

 

Believe in the power of words.

From two-time Academy Award winner Denzel Washington and an ensemble cast lead by Washington that includes Academy Award winner Forest Whitaker, comes THE GREAT DEBATERS.   Inspired by a true story, THE GREAT DEBATERS chronicles the journey of Professor Melvin Tolson (Denzel  Washington), a brilliant but volatile debate team coach who uses the power of words to shape a group of underdog students from a small African American college in the deep south into a historically elite debate team. A controversial figure, Professor Tolson challenged the social mores of the time and was under constant fire for his unconventional and ferocious teaching methods as well as his radical political views.

In their pursuit for excellence, Tolson's debate team receives a groundbreaking invitation to debate Harvard University's championship team. The film is directed by Denzel Washington and stars Washington, Forest Whitaker, Jurnee Smollett, Nate Parker, Denzel Whitaker, and Kimberly Elise. "The Great Debaters" was written by Robert Eisele and produced by Todd Black, Kate Forte, Oprah Winfrey and Joe Roth.
